scripts.check: node --check local-server.js && node --check netlify/functions/claude.js && node --check netlify/functions/config.js && node --check netlify/functions/strava-token.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');const scripts=[...h.matchAll(/<script>([\\s\\S]*?)<\\/script>/g)].map(m=>m[1]).join('\\n');new Function(scripts);console.log('index script OK')"
